Providers nothing resolves stay out of the generated file.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Used struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewUsed() *Used { return &Used{} }

type Unused struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewUnused() *Unused { return &Unused{} }

type Handlers struct {
	Used *Used
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Providers
		webUsed := web.NewUsed()
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			Used: webUsed,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
